name: SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge
summary: SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge provides financial products and services to personal customers, companies, and organizations in Northern Norway. The company offers various savings, lending, and insurance products, as well as payment services. Its activities also include hedging instruments and trading in interest rate and currency instruments; hedging instruments in the commodity derivatives market; sale of Norwegian bonds and certificates, as well as bond market issues; purchase and sale of equities and fund units; and provision of corporate finance and investment banking services, as well as trading and investment advice services. In addition, the company is involved in leasing, consumer financing, real estate brokerage, and accounting operations. It operates through a network of 46 locations across 42 municipalities in Nordland, Troms, Finnmark, and Svalbard. SpareBank 1 Nord-Norge was founded in 1836 and is headquartered in Troms√É¬∏, Norway.
